perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Scaling Engineer", "summary": "Azure access via Stripe Atlas Perks is possible using VOLAURA, Inc.'s EIN and Delaware address, no SSN or US bank required. $250k credits over 2 years, $25k/month cap. ElevenLabs Scale tier needed for video pipeline — $99/month for 2M characters, free tier insufficient. Azure Speech at $16/month for 1M chars under 1000 reqs/month is cheaper. Register Azure via Stripe Atlas dashboard using corporate entity, not personal account. Use registered agent address (e.g., Harvard Business Services) for verification. Mercury bank not required yet. Total cost at $115/month exceeds $100 cap — requires downgrade to Azure Speech or reduced ElevenLabs usage.", "key_sources": ["https://stripe.com/atlas/azure", "https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/pricing/details/machine-learning/", "https://elevenlabs.io/pricing", "https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cost-management-billing/manage/enterprise-create-enrollment"], "gaps_in_current_canon": "No registration path for non-US founders using Stripe Atlas Perks with Azerbaijan residency. Missing cost-benefit analysis between ElevenLabs and Azure Speech for TTS at scale.", "proposed_action": "Register Azure via Stripe Atlas under VOLAURA, Inc. EIN 37-2231884 using Harvard Business Services address. Activate $250k credits. Use Azure Speech instead of ElevenLabs for MVP — $16/month at 1k reqs. Defer ElevenLabs Scale tier until budget allows. Implement usage cap at API gateway.", "whistleblower_flag": null}
perspectives.summary: Azure access via Stripe Atlas Perks is possible using VOLAURA, Inc.'s EIN and Delaware address, no SSN or US bank required. $250k credits over 2 years, $25k/month cap. ElevenLabs Scale tier needed for video pipeline — $99/month for 2M characters, free tier insufficient. Azure Speech at $16/month for 1M chars under 1000 reqs/month is cheaper. Register Azure via Stripe Atlas dashboard using corporate entity, not personal account. Use registered agent address (e.g., Harvard Business Services) for verification. Mercury bank not required yet. Total cost at $115/month exceeds $100 cap — requires downgrade to Azure Speech or reduced ElevenLabs usage.
perspectives.gaps_in_current_canon: No registration path for non-US founders using Stripe Atlas Perks with Azerbaijan residency. Missing cost-benefit analysis between ElevenLabs and Azure Speech for TTS at scale.
perspectives.proposed_action: Register Azure via Stripe Atlas under VOLAURA, Inc. EIN 37-2231884 using Harvard Business Services address. Activate $250k credits. Use Azure Speech instead of ElevenLabs for MVP — $16/month at 1k reqs. Defer ElevenLabs Scale tier until budget allows. Implement usage cap at API gateway.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Security Auditor", "summary": "Azure registration via Stripe Atlas Perks is feasible using VOLAURA Inc.'s EIN and Delaware address. ElevenLabs Core tier ($39) fits budget, but free tier insufficient. Azure credits: $25k+; claim via Atlas dashboard. ElevenLabs vs Azure TTS: ElevenLabs superior for voice quality, cost-effective at scale. Use Mercury for US bank link, not SSN. Avoid US VPN — violates ToS. No Foundation Law violations.", "key_sources": ["https://stripe.com/atlas/perks", "https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/updates/azure-for-startups-stripe-atlas/", "https://elevenlabs.io/pricing", "https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cost-management-billing/manage/billing-upside"], "gaps_in_current_canon": "No verified path for non-US founders to claim Azure via Atlas. No cost-comparison data between ElevenLabs and Azure TTS in memory. Mercury bank status (pending) not reflected in current infra assumptions.", "proposed_action": "1. Claim Azure via Stripe Atlas perk using EIN 37-2231884 and corp address. 2. Register ElevenLabs with Core plan ($39). 3. Route API auth through VOLAURA Inc. accounts. 4. Monitor spend via Azure Cost Management. 5. Switch to Azure Speech if ElevenLabs exceeds $60/month.", "whistleblower_flag": null}
perspectives.summary: Azure registration via Stripe Atlas Perks is feasible using VOLAURA Inc.'s EIN and Delaware address. ElevenLabs Core tier ($39) fits budget, but free tier insufficient. Azure credits: $25k+; claim via Atlas dashboard. ElevenLabs vs Azure TTS: ElevenLabs superior for voice quality, cost-effective at scale. Use Mercury for US bank link, not SSN. Avoid US VPN — violates ToS. No Foundation Law violations.
perspectives.gaps_in_current_canon: No verified path for non-US founders to claim Azure via Atlas. No cost-comparison data between ElevenLabs and Azure TTS in memory. Mercury bank status (pending) not reflected in current infra assumptions.
perspectives.proposed_action: 1. Claim Azure via Stripe Atlas perk using EIN 37-2231884 and corp address. 2. Register ElevenLabs with Core plan ($39). 3. Route API auth through VOLAURA Inc. accounts. 4. Monitor spend via Azure Cost Management. 5. Switch to Azure Speech if ElevenLabs exceeds $60/month.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor", "summary": "Cross-product audit reveals critical gaps: Energy Adaptation (Law 2) missing in 4/5 products; code-index stale by 9 days (CRITICAL — agents simulating); BrandedBy video pipeline R&D ignores P0 shame-free TTS requirement from MindShift integration spec. Azure path可行 via Stripe Atlas Perks with EIN + US corp, no SSN needed. ElevenLabs $99 tier fits budget, but TTS output must be screened for shame-laden prosody per Law 3.", "key_sources": ["ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "MINDSHIFT-INTEGRATION-SPEC", "docs/ECOSYSTEM-MAP.md"], "gaps_in_current_canon": ["No Energy Adaptation in VOLAURA, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, ZEUS; code-index last updated 2026-04-27; ElevenLabs prosody risks not assessed against Law 3"], "whistleblower_flag": null, "proposed_action": "1. Flag stale index — halt agent simulations until sync. 2. Add Energy Adaptation to all products per Law 2. 3. Route ElevenLabs output through MindShift's tone verifier before BrandedBy use. 4. Execute Azure registration via Stripe Atlas dashboard using EIN 37-2231884 and corp docs."}
perspectives.summary: Cross-product audit reveals critical gaps: Energy Adaptation (Law 2) missing in 4/5 products; code-index stale by 9 days (CRITICAL — agents simulating); BrandedBy video pipeline R&D ignores P0 shame-free TTS requirement from MindShift integration spec. Azure path可行 via Stripe Atlas Perks with EIN + US corp, no SSN needed. ElevenLabs $99 tier fits budget, but TTS output must be screened for shame-laden prosody per Law 3.
gaps_in_current_canon: No Energy Adaptation in VOLAURA, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, ZEUS; code-index last updated 2026-04-27; ElevenLabs prosody risks not assessed against Law 3
perspectives.proposed_action: 1. Flag stale index — halt agent simulations until sync. 2. Add Energy Adaptation to all products per Law 2. 3. Route ElevenLabs output through MindShift's tone verifier before BrandedBy use. 4. Execute Azure registration via Stripe Atlas dashboard using EIN 37-2231884 and corp docs.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Assessment Science", "summary": "VOLAURA assessment engine psychometric soundness needs validation. Five areas of concern: IRT 3PL parameters, question pool size, DIF analysis, CAT stopping rules, and temporal decay rationale. Review of apps/api/app/core/assessment/engine.py is required.", "key_sources": ["apps/api/app/core/assessment/engine.py", "memory/atlas/identity.md", "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md"], "gaps_in_current_canon": "IRT 3PL parameters may be guessed, not calibrated from real data. Question pool size per competency may be less than 15, affecting differentiation and reliability.", "proposed_action": "Review engine.py, calibrate IRT 3PL parameters from real data, ensure question pool size meets minimum requirements, conduct DIF analysis, and evaluate CAT stopping rules and temporal decay rationale.", "whistleblower_flag": null}
perspectives.summary: VOLAURA assessment engine psychometric soundness needs validation. Five areas of concern: IRT 3PL parameters, question pool size, DIF analysis, CAT stopping rules, and temporal decay rationale. Review of apps/api/app/core/assessment/engine.py is required.
perspectives.gaps_in_current_canon: IRT 3PL parameters may be guessed, not calibrated from real data. Question pool size per competency may be less than 15, affecting differentiation and reliability.
perspectives.proposed_action: Review engine.py, calibrate IRT 3PL parameters from real data, ensure question pool size meets minimum requirements, conduct DIF analysis, and evaluate CAT stopping rules and temporal decay rationale.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Legal Advisor", "summary": "Conducted research on GDPR Article 22, AZ Personal Data Protection Act, platform liability, data processor agreements, and Terms of Service. Identified potential compliance issues and proposed actions to address them.", "key_sources": ["GDPR Article 22", "AZ Personal Data Protection Act", "Supabase", "Google Cloud", "Railway"], "gaps_in_current_canon": ["Lack of explicit consent flow for automated decision-making", "Insufficient compliance with AZ Personal Data Protection Act for Baku launch", "Unclear platform liability for AURA score usage in hiring decisions", "Missing data processor agreements for Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway", "Inadequate Terms of Service for AI-generated assessments"], "proposed_action": ["Implement explicit consent flow for automated decision-making", "Conduct compliance review for AZ Personal Data Protection Act", "Establish clear guidelines for platform liability regarding AURA score usage", "Establish data processor agreements with Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway", "Update Terms of Service to cover AI-generated assessments"], "whistleblower_flag": null}
perspectives.summary: Conducted research on GDPR Article 22, AZ Personal Data Protection Act, platform liability, data processor agreements, and Terms of Service. Identified potential compliance issues and proposed actions to address them.
gaps_in_current_canon: Lack of explicit consent flow for automated decision-making
Insufficient compliance with AZ Personal Data Protection Act for Baku launch
Unclear platform liability for AURA score usage in hiring decisions
Missing data processor agreements for Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway
Inadequate Terms of Service for AI-generated assessments
proposed_action: Implement explicit consent flow for automated decision-making
Conduct compliance review for AZ Personal Data Protection Act
Establish clear guidelines for platform liability regarding AURA score usage
Establish data processor agreements with Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway
Update Terms of Service to cover AI-generated assessments
